Fernanda, do you know Ana from the trading team?
Yes. When did she start her career here?
She joined us in 2018. Before that, she worked at a small coffee company.
What was her first big project?
A new supplier contract. It was a great achievement, so the company promoted her.
Was the training difficult?
Yes, but the results were excellent. Last year, we decided to hire two more people.
That is a great background. It is a good responsibility for her.

Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel with a quick note about Ana from the trading team. Ana started her career in 2015. Before Sucafina, she worked at a small coffee company in Brazil. In 2018, she joined our team in the trading office. Last year, she helped with a big project, and the company promoted her. The contract for the new supplier was signed in March. It was a great achievement for the team. Thank you.

Hi, this is Fernanda. Here is my update about my own path. I started my career in 2016. Before Sucafina, I worked at a local company. Last year, I joined the trading team and I helped with two projects. The training was difficult, but it was a good experience. My first big responsibility was the new contract. It was signed last week. I was very happy. Thank you.
Here is Ana's story. First, she started her career in 2015. Then, she worked at a small coffee company. Next, she joined Sucafina in 2018. Finally, last year the company promoted her.
